title: Add CORS middleware to coordination API
description: Smoke test test_preflight_headers skips because the coordination API (src/coordination_api.py) has no CORSMiddleware configured. Browser-based clients (e.g., a future dashboard) would need CORS headers. Add FastAPI CORSMiddleware with configurable allowed origins (default: http://localhost:5173 for Vite dev server). Reference: openspec/specs/live-service-testing LST.6.

title: Add /ready endpoint to coordination API
description: Smoke test test_ready_endpoint skips because GET /ready doesn't exist on the coordination API. The /health endpoint works but /ready (which should indicate all dependencies are connected and migrations applied) is missing. Add a /ready endpoint that checks DB connectivity and returns {"status": "ok"} when all services are available. Reference: openspec/specs/live-service-testing LST.6.

title: Harden cleanup-feature smoke test hard gate
description: The cleanup-feature skill (step 2.5a) has a smoke test hard gate that should block merge until smoke tests pass. Currently this gate relies on parsing validation-report.md for a specific Status: line format, but: (1) the merge step (step 3) can execute before the gate check completes, (2) validation reports using table format instead of the expected Status: line bypass the gate, (3) there is no programmatic enforcement — the agent must follow step ordering manually. Fix: Add a programmatic check (Python script or shell function) that returns exit code 1 if smoke tests haven't passed, and call it as a prerequisite to gh pr merge. Consider a pre-merge hook or wrapping the merge command in a gate function.
close_reason: Implemented pre-merge gate: checks all required phases (smoke, security, e2e), CLI with exit codes, --force override, integrated into merge_pr.py, 31 tests passing
